title: Sign in
intro: Enter your <1>Disc Golf Metrix email</1> and we will send you a one-time PIN.
metrixHint1: When logged into Metrix, you can see your email address there
metrixHint2: Or: log into Metrix, click your name top right → <1>Settings</1> → <1>Email address</1>
pinExpiryHint: The PIN is valid for a short time. If the email does not arrive, check spam.
enterPin: Enter the PIN sent to your email:
pinSent: We sent a PIN code to your email.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
metrixUserNotFound: No Disc Golf Metrix user was found for this email.
metrixConsent1: By confirming you allow the JJ100 app to use your Disc Golf Metrix data (ID, name, email).
metrixConsent2: Data is used only in the JJ100 app and is not shared further.
multipleProfiles: This email has several profiles in Disc Golf Metrix. Choose which one to use.
